summary: Frontend dark theme styling testing completed successfully. All 5 pages tested: Staff Augmentation, Managed Services, Business Consulting, About, and Resources. All features verified working correctly.

staff_augmentation_dark_theme.details: Dark theme with bg-slate-900, purple/cyan gradient accents, hero badge with purple styling

staff_augmentation_key_benefits.details: 6 benefit cards with icons (Clock, Award, Zap, Shield, Target, CheckCircle), hover animations working

staff_augmentation_methodology.details: 6 methodology steps with numbered badges (1-6), icons, and connector lines, purple/cyan gradient badges

managed_services_dark_theme.details: Dark theme with blue accent gradient (from-slate-900 via-blue-950 to-slate-900)

managed_services_key_benefits.details: 6 benefit cards with blue icons and hover effects

managed_services_methodology.details: 6 methodology steps with numbered badges and blue/cyan gradient

business_consulting_dark_theme.details: Dark theme with emerald/green accent (from-slate-900 via-emerald-950 to-slate-900)

business_consulting_key_benefits.details: 6 benefit cards with emerald icons and hover effects

business_consulting_methodology.details: 6 methodology steps with numbered badges and emerald/cyan gradient

about_dark_theme.details: Dark theme with gradient headings (Our Story, Core Values, Our Culture), 7 gradient headings found

about_core_values.details: 6 Core Values cards with icons and hover effects (Execution Excellence, Client Partnership, Technical Rigor, Speed with Quality, Continuous Learning, Transparency)

resources_styled_tabs.details: 3 tabs (All Resources, Case Studies, Blog) with cyan active state and proper tab switching

scroll_reveal_animations.details: Scroll-reveal CSS class present, animate-fade-in-up working. 16 elements animate on scroll, transitions correctly from scroll-reveal to animate-fade-in-up

delay_classes.details: Delay classes (delay-100 to delay-600) present in App.css for staggered animations

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages verified with dark theme styling. Staff Aug uses purple accent, Managed Services uses blue accent, Business Consulting uses emerald/green accent. All service pages have 6 Key Benefit cards and 6 Methodology steps with numbered badges. About page has 6 Core Values cards with icons. Resources page has 3 styled tabs. Scroll-reveal animations working with fade-in-up effect on scroll.
